hero_image.subject: Completed roof on a real job site. Crew visible but not posed. Low-angle looking up at the roofline.
hero_image.lighting: Golden hour or overcast. Avoid harsh midday shadows.
hero_image.overlay: rgba(10,15,26,0.55) applied via CSS -- do NOT bake into the image.

service_images.pattern: Each service card uses a dark-gradient-overlay background image. 600x400px minimum.

gallery_images.pattern: Pairs: before-{n}.jpg / after-{n}.jpg. 4:3 aspect ratio. Real job site only -- no stock.

team_photos.source: Client-supplied or scraped from GBP/social, Stage 4
team_photos.pattern: Square crop. Natural light. No studio-style white backgrounds.
